source_excerpt: Operating income was $13,762 million in 2025, compared to $9,992 million in 2024, an increase of $3,770 million, or 38%.
notes: The claim states operating income declined year over year in 2025, but the source explicitly states it increased by $3,770 million (38%) from $9,992 million in 2024 to $13,762 million in 2025. The directionality is directly contradicted by the source.
